name: Black-Bottom Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract; beat until well combined.
3. Stir in the mashed bananas until evenly incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cocoa.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk if needed, mixing just until combined.
6. Divide the batter into two equal parts.
7. Spread one half of the batter in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
8. Sprinkle the remaining cocoa evenly over the top layer.
9. Spoon the remaining batter on top and swirl with a knife to create a marbled effect.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes or until the bars are set and firm to the touch.
Cool.
